reviews.comment:
Ubicado a metros del control Argentino en la rotonda de la RP1 (que va al Hito 1 a 90 kms) y la RN3 es parada obligatoria para cargar Nafta o descansar, ya que por el clima o el trafico, los 70 kms que separan de Rio Grande pueden jugar una mala pasada para los viajeros. Si salen desde Rio Gallegos, llevar Efectivo ya que a veces no esta disponible el cobro con Tarjeta de debido / crédito, a su vez que el motel solo cuenta con 8 habitaciones, por lo que hagan la reserva. A Agosto 2022 la habitación doble está entre $2500 y $4000 la noche (descuento para socios). Destacable el servicio del comedor. Un lujo. A su vez si el clima lo permite se puede disfrutar del amanecer en la playa que esta a 400 mts.

(Translated by Google)
Located a few meters from the Argentine checkpoint at the roundabout on Highway 1 (which leads to Milestone 1, 90 km away) and Highway 3, it is a mandatory stop to refuel or rest, as the 70 km journey from Rio Grande can be a difficult one for travelers due to weather or traffic. If you are departing from Rio Gallegos, bring cash, as debit/credit card payments are sometimes unavailable. The motel only has eight rooms, so please make a reservation. As of August 2022, a double room is between $2,500 and $4,000 per night (member discount). The dining room service is outstanding. A luxury. If the weather permits, you can also enjoy the sunrise on the beach, which is 400 meters away.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias por su comentario. Atte

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/21560828516332243/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1bVltNlVBEAE
